notes:
## 2.9.0

## What's new

- **Anti-Addiction Boost (Self)** — Opt-in pause before Fun, optional grayscale Home, streaks, Fun open awareness, and unlock-ask log. Off by default.
- **Day Off journal & Quick Focus reflection** — Short optional notes when you start/end Day Off or end Quick Focus (including 25‑min Pomodoro).
- **Self insights** — Streak, Boost status, Fun opens, and recent unlock asks on the usage screen.
- **Website** — Calm Family + Self redesign, Self dashboard tab, and light/dark mode.
- **WhatsApp Status** — Blocking Status/Updates stays inside WhatsApp (Chats or one Back) — no longer kicks you to Steady Home.

_Self users: turn on Boost in Settings when you want stronger friction. Parents: same Family protection; kid phones get the WhatsApp fix._
